content.description:
Renders items as clickable cards suitable for lists and grids. Shows title, truncated preview text, and type metadata.

## Features

- Title from `item.name` or `item.content.title`
- 2-line preview from `item.content.body` or `item.content.description`
- Type name in footer
- Hover animation (subtle slide and border color)
- Click opens item as sibling window via `api.siblingContainer`

## Use Cases

- Search results
- Tag browser listings
- Compact item indexes
